name: Choco-Surprise Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:25
Combine flour, baking powder, and cinnamon in a bowl. Set aside.
In another large bowl, combine peanut butter, butter, and brown sugar. Beat well with an electric mixer at medium speed.
Add eggs to the mixture, beating well. Gradually add the dry ingredients, mixing until combined.
Chill the dough for at least 30 minutes.
Shape small rounded teaspoons of dough around each chocolate star and place them on lightly greased cookie sheets.
Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 9 to 11 minutes or until lightly browned.
Cool slightly on wire racks, then roll in powdered sugar. Allow the cookies to cool completely before storing.
Yield: 7 dozen.
